items.title: Madonna, Justin Bieber, Shakira and BTS perform at World Cup half-time show
items.summary: Shakira, Robbie Wiliams and Jennifer Hudson were also part of the star-studded final, as Argentina took on Spain for the title.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Argentina's Lisandro Martínez Departs World Cup Final vs. Spain Early Due To Injury
items.summary: If Argentina is going to beat Spain in the 2206 FIFA World Cup Final, it'll have to do it without one of its top defenders.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
items.summary: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
